original_image_tags: Aged, off-white document page, showing significant bleed-through of typed text from the reverse side, making the faint, mirrored text largely illegible. The page has two punched holes at the top and appears to be the back of a memorandum or form. The lower portion of the page contains multiple stamped receipt markings in blue ink.

elements.description: Multiple blue ink stamps indicating 'RECEIVED' along with dates and times such as 'SEP 10 2:41 PM '47', 'SEP 27 1:29 PM '47', 'SEP 4 10:07 AM '47', and department names including 'INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I.', 'LIAISON SECTION', and 'DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. There is also some faint, illegible handwritten cursive script on the left side.

judge.reason: Both agree on the presence of multiple blue ink stamps in the lower portion, but Description B adds specific quoted text (dates, times, department names) that Description A omits without contradiction.
